The '''Twelfth Squadron''' was a [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that took part in the [[Nagai–Tof War]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The squadron, led by [[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Leader]] [[Taikotelai Akikoma]], was destroyed in the [[Battle of Trenwyth]].
